summary: There was a statistically significant spike in adverse event reports for lisinopril on 2023-01-20, with 68 actual reports compared to an expected 32.7 based on Holt-Winters forecasting.
notable_pattern: Reports from this time window often involved multiple medications and serious adverse events, including death.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should be further investigated before any clinical conclusions can be drawn.
